and believe in myself that I was good enough to be the best guys in the world and um yeah I was able to change it with the mental coach it makes it um a lot easier to deal with it because it's someone that's not indirectly within the team or my family but someone outside of my circle that will really tell me the honest truth um which not saying the team or my family doesn't it makes it easier for
